<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-1_chunk006.pdf#page=12 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-1 p272 -->

<!-- header: PAULANERKLOSTER AM NEUDECK -->

<!-- header: PAULANERKLOSTER AM NEUDEC -->


[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img002.jpg|thumb|6 Entrückung]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img005.jpg|thumb|29 Predigertätigkeit in Sizilier]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img008.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img009.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img010.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img011.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-1_chunk006_p012_img012.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-1 p273 -->
